name: GTM CRM Hygiene Pass
description: Find incomplete or inconsistent CRM records and prepare safe, reviewed corrections.
whenToUse: Use this when you want to find incomplete or inconsistent CRM records and prepare safe, reviewed corrections.
Best for sales and go-to-market teams that want repeatable work without changing the tools they already use.

stages.title: Orient From CRM Context
stages.summary: Read scope, policy, stored records, and prior hygiene lessons.

stages.title: Prepare Cleanup
stages.summary: Identify field updates, notes, tasks, duplicates, and records requiring human review.

stages.title: Optional Apply Cleanup
stages.summary: Execute approved CRM write actions only when granted by the concrete plan.
